items.title: Iran-backed Handala hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's emails
items.dek: The Handala hacking group says the cyberattack is in retaliation for the FBI's recent seizure of the group's websites.
items.body: The Handala hacking group says the cyberattack is in retaliation for the FBI's recent seizure of the group's websites.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Secret Service agent assigned to Jill Biden accidentally shoots himself in leg at airport
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Three dead after helicopter crash in Hawaii
items.dek: The helicopter, which was carrying one pilot and four passengers,crash-landed about 100 yards off a beach, officials say.
items.body: The helicopter, which was carrying one pilot and four passengers,crash-landed about 100 yards off a beach, officials say.
items.author: IriLine Desk
